BRIER.I: integration of pretrained external models with target individual-level data

BRIERi.Rd

Fits a penalized regression model that integrates one or more pretrained external prediction models with target individual-level data. External predictions are integrated into the target response via a tunable eta parameter (one per external model), and lambda is selected over a regularisation path.

Usage

BRIERi(
  X,
  y,
  family = c("gaussian", "binomial", "poisson"),
  eta.list = c(0, exp(seq(log(0.1), log(10), length.out = 20))),
  beta.external = rep(0, ncol(X) + 1),
  multi.method = c("ind", "PCA", "stacking"),
  optim.args = list(),
  ...,
  trace = FALSE,
  ncores = max(1L, parallel::detectCores() - 1L),
  parallel = (ncores > 1L)
)

Arguments

X

A numeric matrix of predictors (n x p) for the target cohort.

y

A numeric response vector of length n.

family

A string specifying the response distribution: "gaussian", "binomial", or "poisson".

eta.list

A list of numeric vectors (one per external model) specifying the eta grid for that model. A single numeric vector is replicated for all external models with a warning.

beta.external

A numeric matrix of external model coefficients ((p+1) x M, where M is the number of external models). Must include the intercept as the first row.

multi.method

A string specifying how to combine multiple external models:

  • "ind": keep external models independent (default).

  • "PCA": aggregate using the first principal component of beta.external.

  • "stacking": aggregate through stacking weights estimated from the target data.

optim.args

A list of arguments passed to optim() when using stacking with binomial or Poisson families.

...

Additional arguments passed to BRIERi.eta (e.g. penalty, alpha, nlambda, penalty.factor).

trace

Logical. If TRUE, prints progress messages during fitting.

ncores

Integer. Number of cores for parallel fitting.

parallel

Logical. If TRUE and on a non-Windows platform, fits the eta grid in parallel using parallel::mclapply.

Value

An object of class "BRIER" containing:

y

The response vector.

y.external

A matrix of external predictions (n x M, or n x 1 after PCA/stacking aggregation).

family

The response family.

eta.list

The list of per-model eta grids.

eta.grid

The full combinatorial eta grid (matrix, rows are combinations).

res

A list of BRIER.eta objects, one per eta combination.

null.dev

The null deviance.

See also

BRIERi.eta, BRIERi.cv, BRIERi.selection, BRIERfull, BRIERs

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
set.seed(1)
n <- 200
p <- 50
X <- matrix(rnorm(n * p), ncol = p)
beta_true <- c(rep(1, 5), rep(0, p - 5))
y <- X %*% beta_true + rnorm(n)

# External model coefficients (intercept + p variables)
beta.external <- matrix(c(0, beta_true * 0.8), ncol = 1)

fit <- BRIERi(
  X, y, family = "gaussian",
  eta.list = list(c(0, 0.5, 1, 2)),
  beta.external = beta.external,
  penalty = "LASSO"
)
} # }
